Terraform will perform the following actions:

  # aws_db_instance.old will be destroyed
  - resource "aws_db_instance" "old" {
      - identifier = "old-db" -> null
    }

  # aws_instance.app must be replaced
-/+ resource "aws_instance" "app" {
      ~ ami           = "ami-old" -> "ami-new" # forces replacement
        instance_type = "t3.micro"
    }

  # aws_s3_bucket.logs will be created
  + resource "aws_s3_bucket" "logs" {
      + bucket = "prod-logs-example"
    }

  # aws_security_group.web will be updated in-place
  ~ resource "aws_security_group" "web" {
      ~ ingress {
          ~ cidr_blocks = [
              - "10.0.0.0/8",
              + "0.0.0.0/0",
            ]
        }
    }

  # aws_instance.unknown will be updated in-place
  ~ resource "aws_instance" "unknown" {
      ~ id = "i-123" -> (known after apply)
    }

  # example_service.secret will be updated in-place
  ~ resource "example_service" "secret" {
      ~ config_value = (sensitive value)
      ~ password     = (sensitive value)
    }

  # example_service.heuristic will be updated in-place
  ~ resource "example_service" "heuristic" {
      ~ api_token = (sensitive value)
    }

  # aws_iam_policy.admin will be updated in-place
  ~ resource "aws_iam_policy" "admin" {
      ~ policy = jsonencode({
          ~ Statement = [
              ~ {
                  ~ Action   = ["ec2:DescribeInstances"] -> ["*"]
                    Resource = ["*"]
                },
            ]
        })
    }

  # helm_release.api will be updated in-place
  ~ resource "helm_release" "api" {
      ~ version = "1.0.0" -> "1.1.0"
    }

  # kubernetes_manifest.pod will be updated in-place
  ~ resource "kubernetes_manifest" "pod" {
      ~ manifest = {
          ~ spec = {
              ~ template = {
                  ~ spec = {
                      ~ containers = [
                          ~ {
                              ~ securityContext = {
                                  ~ privileged = false -> true
                                }
                            },
                        ]
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

Changes to Outputs:
  ~ endpoint = "old.example.com" -> "new.example.com"

Plan: 1 to add, 7 to change, 1 to destroy.
